description: This pipeline overlays greyscale or RGB images, grouping incoming data based on annotations, and then outputs the result, specifically an overlay of certain gaps.

7a92170a-81d1-4dc1-8772-17742c2ac071.name: ij1-color-blend-images
7a92170a-81d1-4dc1-8772-17742c2ac071.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
